evidence_refs.quote: We report on the implementation and validation of a Python-stdlib-only static cartography harness applied to a single real public repository. The cartographer extracts file inventories, Python module inventories, symbol tables, import graphs, parse-health telemetry, and throughput and memory metrics without external dependencies.
